nasb.text: But He did not answer her a word. And His disciples came and implored Him, saying, “Send her away, because she keeps shouting at us.”

esv.text: But he did not answer her a word. And his disciples came and begged him, saying, “Send her away, for she is crying out after us.”

cnv.text: 耶穌一句話也不回答她。門徒上前求他說：“請叫她走吧，她一直跟在我們後面喊叫。”

ccb.text: 耶稣却一言不发。门徒上前求祂说：“请让她走吧！她老是在后面喊叫。”

csbs.text: 耶稣一句话也不回应，他的门徒们上前来求他，说：“这妇人一直跟在我们后面喊叫，请让她走吧。”
